name: @ont/publisher
description: ONT clean runnable publisher service. HTTP assemble+broadcast shell over @ont/adapter-publisher with an injected broadcast port; no signing, private accumulator, or live network in tests.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-publisher && vitest run
